ai_summary: This document indicates that Parsvnath Developers Limited is undergoing a Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), as evidenced by the scheduling of its second Committee of Creditors (COC) meeting and the involvement of a Resolution Professional. This is a material impact, signaling severe financial distress where control has shifted from management to the Resolution Professional and creditors. The formation of a COC and the appointment of an RP are significant red flags for investors, implying potential restructuring or even liquidation.
